description: Standards template for managing drift against ACSC Essential Eight cybersecurity framework. Maps to P1 (Patch Applications), P2 (Patch OS), P3 (MFA), P6 (Macro Restrictions), and P7 (Application Hardening) requirements.

standards.name: standards.AuditLog
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Required for event logging and analysis (R13-R18 ML2, R18-R22 ML3)

standards.name: standards.EnableMailboxAuditing
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Mailbox auditing for compliance and investigation

standards.name: standards.EnableFIDO2
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Phishing-resistant MFA for ML2+ (P3R10-R12, P3R20-R23)

standards.name: standards.EnableHardwareOAuth
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Hardware tokens for phishing-resistant MFA

standards.name: standards.DisableSMS
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Remove SMS as MFA method (not phishing-resistant per ACSC)

standards.name: standards.DisableVoice
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Remove Voice call as MFA method (not phishing-resistant per ACSC)

standards.name: standards.NudgeMFA
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Encourage MFA registration for all users

standards.name: standards.PerUserMFA
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Track per-user MFA status as fallback when CA not available

standards.name: standards.OauthConsent
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents unauthorized app consent (reduces attack surface)

standards.name: standards.DisableGuests
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Review guest access regularly for ML2+ compliance

standards.name: standards.StaleEntraDevices
standards.notes: P1/P2 Patching - Remove stale devices from update compliance scope

standards.name: standards.DisableBasicAuthSMTP
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Disables legacy authentication (reduces attack surface)

standards.name: standards.PhishProtection
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Branding protection helps identify phishing attempts

standards.name: standards.ActivityBasedTimeout
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Session timeout reduces window of opportunity for attackers

standards.name: standards.PasswordExpireDisabled
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Modern password guidance (NIST/Microsoft) - no forced expiration

standards.name: standards.CustomBannedPasswordList
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Check banned password list is configured

standards.name: standards.DisableSecurityGroupUsers
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents users creating security groups (attack surface reduction)

standards.name: standards.DisableTenantCreation
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Restricts shadow IT tenant creation

standards.name: standards.DisableSelfServiceLicenses
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents unauthorized software acquisition

standards.name: standards.AuthMethodsSettings
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Enable suspicious activity reporting

standards.name: standards.AddDKIM
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Email authentication for anti-phishing

standards.name: standards.RotateDKIM
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Ensure DKIM keys are 2048-bit

standards.name: standards.EnableCustomerLockbox
standards.notes: P1/P2 Patching - Controls Microsoft access to tenant for updates/patches

standards.name: standards.RestrictThirdPartyStorageServices
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents data exfiltration via third-party storage

standards.name: standards.FormsPhishingProtection
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Internal phishing protection in Forms

standards.name: standards.DisableGuestDirectory
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Prevents guest enumeration of directory

standards.name: standards.GuestInvite
standards.notes: P3 MFA - Controls who can invite guests

standards.name: standards.laps
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Local Admin Password Solution for device security

standards.name: standards.BitLockerKeysForOwnedDevice
standards.notes: P7 Hardening - Users can recover BitLocker keys for owned devices

intuneTemplates.name: Essential Eight - ASR Rules (P6/P7)
intuneTemplates.description: Attack Surface Reduction rules for Macro Restrictions (P6) and Application Hardening (P7)

intuneTemplates.name: Essential Eight - Patch Management (P1/P2)
intuneTemplates.description: Windows Update for Business settings to meet 48-hour critical patching SLA

intuneTemplates.name: Essential Eight - Device Compliance
intuneTemplates.description: Device compliance for patch status and security requirements

conditionalAccessTemplates.name: Essential Eight - MFA for All Users (P3R1)
conditionalAccessTemplates.description: Require MFA for all users accessing Microsoft 365 services - ML1 requirement

conditionalAccessTemplates.name: Essential Eight - Admin Phishing-Resistant MFA (P3R10-R12 ML2)
conditionalAccessTemplates.description: Require phishing-resistant MFA for administrative roles - ML2+ requirement

conditionalAccessTemplates.name: Essential Eight - Block Legacy Auth (P7)
conditionalAccessTemplates.description: Block legacy authentication protocols - Application Hardening
